message:
Restore useful comments and log output

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -105,20 +105,27 @@ jobs:
 
       - name: Update version.json and Python package versions
         run: |
+          # Extract version without 'v' prefix
           VERSION_NUMBER=$(echo "${{ steps.release.outputs.version }}" | sed 's/^v//')
 
+          # Update tenzir-version in version.json using jq
           jq --arg version "${VERSION_NUMBER}" '.["tenzir-version"] = $version' version.json > version.json.tmp
           mv version.json.tmp version.json
 
+          # Update package versions with uv
           for package_dir in tenzir-common tenzir-operator tenzir; do
             uv --directory "python/${package_dir}" version --frozen "${VERSION_NUMBER}"
           done
 
+          # Keep dependency constraints in sync with the new version
           UPPER_BOUND=$(uvx --from semver pysemver bump minor "${VERSION_NUMBER}")
           uv --directory python add --package tenzir --frozen "tenzir-common>=${VERSION_NUMBER},<${UPPER_BOUND}"
           uv --directory python add --package tenzir-operator --frozen "tenzir-common>=${VERSION_NUMBER},<${UPPER_BOUND}"
           uv --directory python lock
 
+          echo "Updated version.json with tenzir-version: ${VERSION_NUMBER}"
+          echo "Updated Python package versions to: ${VERSION_NUMBER}"
+
       - name: Generate SBOM artifact
         run: nix run .#generate-sbom -- /tmp/tenzir.spdx.json
